SELECT addr, isIPv6String(addr) FROM (SELECT ['2001:db8::1', '192.0.2.1', '::', 'fe80::1ff:fe23:4567:890a'] AS addr) ARRAY JOIN addr;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_addresses) AS total_count SELECT addr, isIPv6String(addr), total_count FROM ip_addresses;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT addr, isIPv6String(addr) AS is_ipv6 FROM ip_addresses;
SELECT a.addr, b.is_ipv6 FROM (SELECT addr FROM ip_addresses) AS a JOIN (SELECT addr, isIPv6String(addr) as is_ipv6 FROM ip_addresses) AS b ON a.addr = b.addr;
SELECT addr, isIPv6String(addr) FROM (SELECT addr FROM (SELECT ['::1', '192.0.2.1'] AS addr) ARRAY JOIN addr) WHERE addr IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT addr FROM ip_addresses WHERE isIPv6String(addr) = 1) AS ipv6_addresses SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ipv6_addresses;
